notes: This kernel is normative for the published DeciRepo V0_1 baseline slice only.
Any future DLX binding must be explicit and pinned rather than inferred.

evaluation_model.true_condition: operator evaluates successfully and the declared condition holds
evaluation_model.false_condition: operator evaluates successfully and the declared condition does not hold
evaluation_model.predicate_error_condition: kernel definition is malformed or references an unsupported operator or argument shape
evaluation_model.sample_type_mismatch_treatment: operator evaluates to false unless the operator contract states otherwise
evaluation_model.oracle_contract: bounded-profile oracles must reject malformed kernel definitions rather than silently reinterpret them

all_of.true_when: all child predicates evaluate to true
all_of.false_when: at least one child predicate evaluates to false
all_of.predicate_error_when: any child predicate evaluates to predicate_error

any_of.true_when: at least one child predicate evaluates to true
any_of.false_when: all child predicates evaluate to false
any_of.predicate_error_when: any child predicate evaluates to predicate_error and no child predicate evaluates to true

not.true_when: the single child predicate evaluates to false
not.false_when: the single child predicate evaluates to true
not.predicate_error_when: the single child predicate evaluates to predicate_error

input_is_json_object.evaluation: true iff the artifact input is a JSON object
input_is_json_object.false_semantics: artifact is not a JSON object
input_is_json_object.predicate_error_semantics: operator declaration contains unsupported extra arguments

supported_command.evaluation: true iff the active command is inside domain.supported_commands
supported_command.false_semantics: active command is outside the bounded profile command set
supported_command.predicate_error_semantics: supported command set cannot be resolved from the kernel

field_present.evaluation: true iff the named top-level field exists in the artifact object
field_present.predicate_error_semantics: field key is missing or not a string

equals.false_semantics: field differs from value or is absent
equals.predicate_error_semantics: field key is missing or malformed

optional_equals_artifact_id.evaluation: true iff artifact[field] is absent or equals the computed artifact_id
optional_equals_artifact_id.false_semantics: field is present and does not equal the computed artifact_id
optional_equals_artifact_id.predicate_error_semantics: artifact_id context cannot be resolved or field key is malformed

if_field_equals_then_field_equals.evaluation: true iff artifact[if_field] != if_value or artifact[then_field] == then_value
if_field_equals_then_field_equals.predicate_error_semantics: required field names are missing or malformed

non_empty_array.evaluation: true iff artifact[field] is an array with length > 0
non_empty_array.false_semantics: field is absent, not an array, or empty

each_step_has_keys.evaluation: true iff every object in artifact[field] contains all required_keys
each_step_has_keys.false_semantics: field is not an array of objects with the required keys
each_step_has_keys.predicate_error_semantics: required_keys is malformed or field key is malformed

allowed_local_transitions.evaluation: true iff every transition in artifact[field] is listed in allowed
allowed_local_transitions.false_semantics: at least one transition falls outside the allowed local transition set
allowed_local_transitions.predicate_error_semantics: allowed transition list is malformed or field key is malformed

continuous_chain.evaluation: true iff each transition step begins where the previous step ended
continuous_chain.false_semantics: transition chain is discontinuous or malformed

present.evaluation: true iff the named field exists
present.predicate_error_semantics: field key is missing or malformed

is_object.evaluation: true iff artifact[field] is a JSON object
is_object.false_semantics: field is absent or not a JSON object

is_64_hex.evaluation: true iff artifact[field] is a lowercase 64-character hexadecimal string
is_64_hex.false_semantics: field is absent or not a lowercase 64-character hexadecimal string

enum.evaluation: true iff artifact[field] is a member of allowed
enum.false_semantics: field is absent or outside the allowed enum
enum.predicate_error_semantics: allowed enum list is malformed or field key is malformed

stages.semantics: assign exactly one declared class bucket before class selection and verdict derivation
resolve one class_id or an explicit ordered precedence chain within the selected bucket
derive the final normalized result only after bucket and class assignment complete

state_projection_registry.artifact_is_json_object: true iff the sample input is a JSON object
state_projection_registry.command_supported: true iff the active command belongs to domain.supported_commands
state_projection_registry.identity_surface_resolved: true iff artifact.rebuild_source resolves and canonical identity bytes plus artifact_id are computable
state_projection_registry.multiple_reason_codes: true iff normalized_result.reason_codes contains at least two distinct reason codes after fixed_total_order_then_deduplicate normalization for the active rule-status view
state_projection_registry.unknown_top_level_fields_outside_identit: true iff at least one top-level field outside the declared known top-level artifact field set is present
